response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r0c2's SoC is critically below threshold (36% vs 40% minimum); despite my own tight margin (37%), the neighborhood outage stress and their prior reciprocal support justify providing 0.5 kWh while maintaining my 2-tick safety buffer.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
